metadata.title: Marrakech Riads Rent | Stylish Stays in Marrakech
metadata.description: A carefully selected collection of riads, villas, and apartments in Marrakech. Quality properties, personal service, and a warm welcome in the Red City.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your Marrakech Experience
about.storyText: We are passionate about Marrakech and dedicated to providing our guests with authentic, memorable experiences in the Red City.
about.missionText: To offer carefully selected properties that combine traditional Moroccan charm with modern comfort.
about.teamText: Our local team is here to ensure your stay is perfect from start to finish.
